allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Quick wins complete: bring-to-front, skip feedback, keyboard shortcuts, remove Vimeo menu item, fix save_metadata bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Progress bar fix, parallel encoding, Instagram carousel metadata fix, avoid audio description tracks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in core/downloader.py core/encoder.py ui/main_window.py ui/components/download_item.py)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from core.metadata import is_exiftool_available, _exiftool_cmd
print\('cmd:', _exiftool_cmd\(\)\)
print\('available:', is_exiftool_available\(\)\)
import os; log = os.path.expanduser\('~/Library/Logs/dlwithit/metadata.log'\)
if os.path.exists\(log\):
    with open\(log\) as f: print\(f.read\(\)[-2000:]\)
")
Bash(cp dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/" && cp -R dist/dlwithit.app dist/dmg-staging/)

Bash(\\
  rm -f dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi && \\
  cd extension_minimal && \\
  zip -r ../dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi . --exclude "*.DS_Store" && \\
  echo "Done: $\(ls -lh ../dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi\)")

Bash(\\
  rm -rf dist/dmg-staging && \\
  mkdir -p "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension" && \\
  cp -R dist/dlwithit.app dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  cp dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/" && \\
  cat > "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/INSTALL.md" << 'EOF'
# dlwithit Firefox Extension

## Installation

1. Open Firefox
2. Go to `about:addons` \(or open the menu → Add-ons and themes\)
3. Click the gear icon ⚙ → "Install Add-on From File..."
4. Select `dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi` from this folder

The extension adds a download button to supported sites and communicates
with the dlwithit.app companion app.

## Requirements

- dlwithit.app must be installed in your Applications folder first
- Firefox 109 or later
EOF
echo "Staging ready:"
ls "dist/dmg-staging/" && ls "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/")

Bash(\\
  rm -rf dist/dmg-staging && \\
  mkdir -p "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension" && \\
  cp -R dist/dlwithit.app dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  cp dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/")

Bash(\\
  rm -f dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg && \\
  create-dmg \\
    --volname "dlwithit" \\
    --volicon "assets/dlwithit.icns" \\
    --window-pos 200 120 \\
    --window-size 660 420 \\
    --icon-size 100 \\
    --icon "dlwithit.app" 160 200 \\
    --app-drop-link 500 200 \\
    --icon "Firefox Extension" 330 320 \\
    --hide-extension "dlwithit.app" \\
    "dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg" \\
    "dist/dmg-staging" 2>&1 | grep -v "^Reading\\|^  \(CRC\\|^Writing\\|^  \(Apple\\|^   \(")

Bash(cd /Users/seanstarkweather/Projects/dlwithit && \\
  rm -rf dist/dmg-staging && mkdir -p "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension" && \\
  cp dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/" && \\
  cp INSTALL.md "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/" && \\
  cp -R dist/dlwithit.app dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  rm -f dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg && \\
  create-dmg \\
    --volname "dlwithit" \\
    --volicon "assets/dlwithit.icns" \\
    --window-pos 200 120 \\
    --window-size 660 520 \\
    --icon-size 100 \\
    --icon "dlwithit.app" 160 200 \\
    --app-drop-link 500 200 \\
    --icon "Firefox Extension" 330 400 \\
    --hide-extension "dlwithit.app" \\
    "dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg" \\
    "dist/dmg-staging" 2>&1 | grep -v "^Reading\\|^  \(CRC\\|^   \(")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('Pillow OK'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "No Pillow")
Bash(.venv/bin/pip install pillow -q && .venv/bin/python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)")
Bash(cp dist/README.html dist/dmg-staging/ && rm -f dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg && hdiutil detach /Volumes/dlwithit 2>/dev/null || true)

Bash(cp dist/README.html dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  rm -f dist/dlwithit-1.0.0.dmg && \\
  hdiutil detach /Volumes/dlwithit 2>/dev/null || true)

Bash(python3 -c "import platform; print\(platform.mac_ver\(\)\)" && python3 --version && file .venv/lib/python3.13/lib-dynload/pyexpat.cpython-313-darwin.so 2>/dev/null || echo "not found at that path" && find .venv -name "pyexpat*.so" 2>/dev/null | head -3)
Bash(brew info python@3.13 | grep -E "built for|deployment|minos|Installed" | head -10 && brew list --formula | grep python)

Bash(vtool -show dist/dlwithit.app/Contents/MacOS/dlwithit 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "---" && find dist/dlwithit.app -name "*.so" | head -3 | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "{}:"; vtool -show "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "minos|platform"')
Bash(find dist/dlwithit.app -name "*.so" -o -name "*.dylib" | xargs -I{} sh -c 'vtool -show "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "minos 15" && echo "{}"' | head -20)
Bash(find dist/dlwithit.app -name "*.so" -o -name "*.dylib" | while read f; do vtool -show "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "minos 15" && echo "$f"; done | wc -l)

Bash(find dist/dlwithit.app \\\( -name "*.so" -o -name "*.dylib" \\\) | while read f; do vtool -show "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "minos 15" && echo "STILL 15: $f"; done | head && echo "\(any output above = not patched\)")
Bash(cat requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "no requirements.txt" && pip list --format=freeze 2>/dev/null | head -5 || .venv/bin/pip list --format=freeze | grep -v "^#" | head -20)

Bash(rm -rf dist/dmg-staging && mkdir -p "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension" && \\
  cp dist/dlwithit-extension-1.0.0.xpi "dist/dmg-staging/Firefox Extension/" && \\
  cp dist/README.html dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  cp -R dist/dlwithit.app dist/dmg-staging/ && \\
  echo "Staging ready:" && ls dist/dmg-staging/)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import yt_dlp
url = 'https://www.tiktok.com/@nasa/video/7187862472476886318'
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL\({'quiet': True}\) as ydl:
    supported = any\(
        ie.suitable\(url\)
        for ie in ydl._ies.values\(\)
        if ie.ie_key\(\) != 'Generic'
    \)
print\(supported\)
")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import cairosvg; print\('cairosvg ok'\)" 2>/dev/null || .venv/bin/python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('pillow ok'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "neither available")
